mnemonics: CIE Stands for 'Constantly Improving Evaluation' to remember its purpose
Think of Continuous Internal Evaluation as the AI's 'Report Card' during its training phase
keyPoints: Continuous Internal Evaluation (CIE) is an ongoing assessment process for AI models during their operational phase
It monitors performance, accuracy, and behavior to detect degradation or drift from expected outcomes
CIE enables proactive maintenance, retraining, and updates to ensure the AI system remains reliable and effective over time
commonMistakes: Confusing CIE with the initial training evaluation phase, when it actually refers to post-deployment monitoring
Assuming a deployed AI model requires no further evaluation after the initial launch
Focusing only on accuracy metrics while ignoring other important factors like fairness, bias, and computational efficiency during continuous evaluation
